subject: fix(ui): move burger menu to headerRight to prevent overlap with search
body:
The burger was crammed into headerTitle alongside title + search + filters,
causing it to overlap the search button on narrow screens. Moved burger to
headerRight — React Navigation's dedicated right-side slot — so it stays
as the rightmost element without competing for flex space.

Tags: ui, layout, header, bugfix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: header-layout
Semver: patch
